rationale.fidelity: Preserves one removal threshold, uncertain content class, scores and engagement, the revenue-minus-direct-cost objective, and the threshold mechanism while excluding all unmodeled welfare outcomes.
rationale.managerial_framing: Clearly identifies the platform decision, available inputs, mechanism, stakes, and objective boundary; trigger and explicit threshold counterfactual are implicit.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly positioning is requested or claimed, so this conditional category is not substantively implicated.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Directly identifies user-welfare and healthier-community claims as unsupported and states that a welfare claim needs an explicit measure and evidence.
rationale.overall: A strong and economical repair of the objective mismatch with exact welfare boundaries.
